outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: US eyes potential second round of talks with Iran as blockade takes hold
outlets.summary: CNN live updates: On Day 1 of the blockade, little traffic at Iranian ports. Trump says Iran 'wants a deal badly.' US officials eyeing second round of talks possibly Thursday. Trump refuses to apologize to Pope Leo. Analysis: blockade risks 'serious blow to global economy.'

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Efforts underway for second round of U.S.-Iran talks as Strait of Hormuz showdown endures
outlets.summary: NPR/MPR News: Blockade in full effect, Iran calls it 'piracy.' US and Iran in contact — potential second round of talks as soon as Thursday. Sanctioned Chinese tanker Rich Starry transited Hormuz. Israel-Lebanon direct talks begin in Washington — first since 1993.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump details 'all or nothing' Strait of Hormuz blockade; Iran's president says deal possible if US 'abandons totalitarianism'
outlets.summary: Fox News live updates: Blockade takes hold, Trump says Iran wants deal 'very badly.' Trump refuses to apologize to Pope Leo, calls him 'very weak.' Mossad Chief Barnea: mission not over until regime falls. Katz: enriched uranium removal is a 'precondition' to ending war.

outlets.name: Washington Times
outlets.headline: Trump and Leo chronicles: A president and a pope square off over Iran and its aftermath
outlets.summary: Washington Times analysis of escalating Trump-Pope Leo feud. Trump refuses to apologize, calls Leo 'WEAK' and 'terrible for foreign policy.' Pope in Algeria continues anti-war tour. Feud threatens Trump's Catholic voter base. Israel-Lebanon historic talks in DC brokered by Rubio.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Three ships pass through Hormuz strait amid US-Iran blockade standoff
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog: Blockade day 1 — sanctioned tankers transit despite blockade. Trump says Iran wants deal. UK's Starmer refuses to join blockade. Macron-Starmer announce Friday Hormuz summit for 40+ nations. Lavrov in Beijing for Russia-China Iran war diplomacy. Israel-Lebanon talks in DC begin.

outlets.name: Reuters / Bloomberg
outlets.headline: US and Iran weigh further truce talks with Trump blockade underway
outlets.summary: Bloomberg/Reuters: Both sides considering second round of talks. China calls blockade 'dangerous and irresponsible.' Macron-Starmer to chair Friday 40-nation Hormuz summit. CFR analysis: Trump faces dilemma — small strikes won't move Tehran, massive campaign risks wider war.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: Iran's enriched uranium will be removed by agreement or resumed fighting
outlets.summary: ToI: Netanyahu sets firm uranium removal condition. Mossad Chief Barnea at Holocaust ceremony: mission ends 'only when regime is replaced.' Katz: uranium removal is 'precondition.' Israel-Lebanon direct talks launched in DC. IDF still fighting Hezbollah near Bint Jbeil.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Katz defines conditions for end of war as Mossad Chief vows Iran regime change efforts will continue
outlets.summary: JPost live: Katz calls uranium removal a precondition. Barnea vows Mossad will work until Iranian regime falls. 17 foreign ministers urge Israel and Lebanon to 'seize this opportunity' ahead of first Washington talks. Rubio calls it 'historic opportunity.'

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Tehran warns of dangerous repercussions from US provocations in Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: PressTV: Araghchi calls Lavrov to condemn US blockade. Iran's UN envoy Iravani sends letter to UNSC calling blockade a 'gross violation of sovereignty.' Pezeshkian: deal possible if US 'abandons totalitarianism.' Anti-blockade rallies in Tehran. IRGC: US encroachment is ceasefire violation.

outlets.name: Tehran Times / IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran's Pezeshkian: National resistance shattered enemy dream of Iran's collapse
outlets.summary: IRNA/Tehran Times: Pezeshkian rallies domestic support with 'national resistance' framing. Offers deal if US drops 'totalitarianism.' Iran navy chief calls blockade 'ridiculous and laughable.' Mohsen Rezaei warns Iran has 'major untouched levers' not yet deployed.
